Finish with a fenced JSON block tagged `acceptance-report` in this shape:


criteriaSatisfied.evidence: Created src/model_shelf/import_model.py (ImportResult dataclass + import_model function), tests/test_import.py (21 tests), modified cli.py (cmd_import + wiring) and __init__.py (ImportResult + import_model exported). Full test suite: 75 passed, 0 failed.

validationOutput: All 21 import tests pass: format detection (gguf/mlx/safetensors + edge cases), quant auto-detection, SHA256 stability, hardlink same-FS, skip duplicate, manifest update, org override, auto-detect quant, __init__ export, CLI subcommand registration.
All 54 existing tests still green: config (8), detect (6), relocate (7), resolver (27), search (5).
No new external dependencies added — stdlib only.
residualRisks: Handoff test specs had two inconsistencies resolved: MLX test now passes format=mlx explicitly (detection correctly returns safetensors when .safetensors files present), and manifest test uses model-Q4_0.gguf for valid quant auto-detection.

childReport.manualNotes: The import command is fully wired into the CLI: `model-shelf import <path> [--format] [--org] [--repo] [--quant] [--no-hardlink] [--json]`. Return codes: 0 (imported/skipped), 1 (error).
